name: contact_info_scraper
title: Contact Info Scraper
description: Extract public emails, phone numbers, social profiles, and contact-page URLs from company websites with a bounded same-origin browser crawl.

seo.title: Contact Info Scraper Tool for Emails, Phones, and Social Profiles
seo.description: Extract public contact details from company websites with Better Fetch: emails, phone numbers, social profiles, contact pages, and source URLs for lead generation and CRM enrichment.
seo.intro: Contact Info Scraper turns public company websites into structured outreach signals. It starts from one URL or a short list of URLs, renders each site through Better Fetch, follows likely same-origin contact, about, support, team, press, and legal pages, then returns public emails, phone numbers, social profile links, contact-page URLs, and per-page evidence. It is built for lead enrichment and agent workflows that need contact signals without hand-copying details from a website.

useCases.title: Lead list enrichment
useCases.description: Add public emails, phone numbers, and social profile URLs to a list of company websites before routing records into a CRM.

useCases.title: Sales and partnership research
useCases.description: Give an agent the contact pages and source URLs it needs to draft outreach or decide whether a company is reachable.

useCases.title: Directory QA
useCases.description: Check whether listed businesses still expose valid-looking public contact details and social profiles on their own websites.

faqs.question: Does Contact Info Scraper verify email deliverability?
faqs.answer: No. This v0.1 extracts public email-looking strings and mailto links from visible website pages. It does not send verification probes or enrich private contact databases.

faqs.question: How far does it crawl?
faqs.answer: It keeps a bounded same-origin crawl. By default it scans the start page plus likely contact/about/support pages, with max_pages_per_site and max_total_pages caps for predictable agent runs.

faqs.question: Does it scrape private social data?
faqs.answer: No. It only returns public social profile URLs linked from the website, such as LinkedIn, Facebook, Instagram, X/Twitter, YouTube, TikTok, Threads, Snapchat, or Telegram links.

urls.description: Optional additional public website URLs to scan

max_pages_per_site.description: Maximum same-origin pages to scan per starting URL

max_total_pages.description: Maximum pages to scan across all starting URLs

max_emails.description: Maximum unique emails to return per site

max_phones.description: Maximum unique phone numbers to return per site

include_social_profiles.description: Return public social profile URLs linked from scanned pages

wait_ms.description: Additional browser wait time after DOMContentLoaded

pages_scanned.description: Number of pages scanned for this site
